description: A Quantitative Analyst needs to detect 'V-Shape Reversal' patterns in Oracle Corp (ORCL) stock data to backtest a trading strategy. Connect to the HR database (host=localhost, port=1521, database=XEPDB1, user=hr, password=hr123) and query the STOCK_PRICES table. A 'V-Shape Reversal' is defined as a down leg of at least 2 consecutive days of price drops followed immediately by an up leg of at least 2 consecutive days of price increases, where the lowest price in the pattern is at least 5.0% lower than the starting price (the price on the day before the first drop). Save the SQL query used to identify these patterns to /home/ga/Desktop/
